description_long: This futuristic unicycle features a striking black and neon green color scheme, with glowing accents and a prominent circular emblem on its side reminiscent of the Green Lantern symbol. The frame is robust and angular, incorporating visible suspension springs, a single large wheel with intricate spoke design, and a compact, cushioned saddle seat. The front is equipped with a luminous headlight and a transparent, domed windscreen, while the rear displays a digital license plate reading 'XBP-28'. Handlebars are mounted with control devices and a digital display, suggesting advanced electronic functionality. The wheel and frame are adorned with glowing green circuitry patterns, giving the vehicle a high-tech, almost sci-fi appearance. The overall build suggests a blend of metal, plastic, and electronic components, designed for both style and performance in an urban environment.
description: A high-tech, neon green and black unicycle with glowing accents, a digital display, and a futuristic design featuring a single large wheel and a cushioned saddle seat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the circular headlight, transparent windscreen, and handlebars with control devices.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the glowing circular emblem, visible suspension, and intricate wheel design.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the saddle seat, handlebar arrangement, and digital license plate at the rear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the suspension, glowing accents, and detailed wheel structure.
attribute_frame_design: reinforced, angular, high-tech with glowing accents
